title: Actuarial Analyst
description: JPMorgan Chase is seeking an Actuarial Analyst to support risk management and financial modeling initiatives. You'll analyze risk data, develop models, and support underwriting decisions. Work onsite in Charlotte for a leading global financial services firm.
responsibilities: Analyze risk data and develop actuarial models

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Finance, or related field

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
